ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 5, Chisato and Takina track a target through Tokyo Station, with Chisato's signature carefree attitude on full display as she navigates the crowds effortlessly. The iconic red-brick facade and Marunouchi plaza are key backdrops in the chase.
